SEARCH
Package neqsim.standards.gasquality

Class OrificeWellTester

java.lang.Object
neqsim.standards.gasquality.OrificeWellTester
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OrificeWellTester extends Object implements Serializable
Gas-well flow rate calculator using the GPSA critical-flow prover (orifice well tester) method. The critical-flow prover discharges gas to atmosphere through an orifice plate sized so that the flow is sonic (the downstream pressure is less than the critical ratio of the upstream pressure), which fixes the flow as a function of the upstream static pressure only.

The GPSA Engineering Data Book gives the rate as:

Qg = C · Pf · Ftf · Fg · Fpv

  • C – orifice coefficient from the prover plate tables (input, depends on plate bore and tap type)
  • Pf – upstream static (flowing) pressure, psia
  • Ftf = √(520 / Tf) – flowing-temperature factor (Tf in °R)
  • Fg = √(1 / G) – specific-gravity factor (G = gas gravity, air = 1)
  • Fpv – supercompressibility factor (1/√Z)

The result Qg is in Mscf/day at the standard base of the supplied coefficient table.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    • OrificeWellTester

      public OrificeWellTester()

  • Method Details

    • setOrificeCoefficient

      public void setOrificeCoefficient(double coefficient)
      Sets the orifice coefficient from the prover plate table.
      Parameters:
      coefficient - orifice coefficient C in Mscf/day per psia (must be > 0)

    • setFlowingConditions

      public void setFlowingConditions(double pressurePsia, double temperatureRankine)
      Sets the flowing conditions.
      Parameters:
      pressurePsia - upstream static pressure in psia (must be > 0)
      temperatureRankine - flowing temperature in degrees Rankine (must be > 0)

    • setGasProperties

      public void setGasProperties(double gravity, double zFactor)
      Sets the gas properties.
      Parameters:
      gravity - gas specific gravity (air = 1, must be > 0)
      zFactor - compressibility factor Z at flowing conditions (must be > 0)

    • calcRate

      public void calcRate()
      Runs the GPSA critical-flow prover rate calculation.

    • getTemperatureFactor

      public double getTemperatureFactor()
      Returns the flowing-temperature factor Ftf.
      Returns:
      temperature factor (dimensionless)

    • getGravityFactor

      public double getGravityFactor()
      Returns the specific-gravity factor Fg.
      Returns:
      gravity factor (dimensionless)

    • getSupercompressibilityFactor

      public double getSupercompressibilityFactor()
      Returns the supercompressibility factor Fpv.
      Returns:
      supercompressibility factor (dimensionless)

    • getGasRate

      public double getGasRate()
      Returns the calculated gas rate.
      Returns:
      gas rate in Mscf/day

    • toJson

      Serializes the calculation results to a pretty-printed JSON string.

      JSON representation of the results
